Incident Description: Authentication requests experiencing high latency under load
Root Cause: Thread contention due to synchronous DB calls
Resolution:
1. Inspect thread dump for blocked threads
2. Identify synchronous DB calls
3. Convert blocking calls to async
4. Optimize DB queries
5. Deploy fix and monitor latency

Incident Description: Users unable to login due to token rejection
Resolution:
1. Compare signing keys across services
2. Validate key rotation timeline
3. Synchronize keys
4. Restart services gracefully
5. Verify login success rate
